title: Solar Basics for Homeowners
summary: Learn what rooftop solar equipment does, how power moves through the home, and which questions to ask before requesting a quote.

title: Check Roof and Property Readiness
summary: Review roof age, shade, available space, and ownership details so a quote conversation starts with the right context.

title: Understand Your Utility Bill
summary: Use your bill to find monthly usage, rate structure clues, and seasonal patterns that shape a practical solar conversation.

title: Incentives Without the Jargon
summary: Understand the kinds of solar incentives that may exist without treating them as guaranteed tax, legal, or financial advice.

title: Batteries and Backup Power
summary: Decide whether batteries match your outage needs, critical loads, budget expectations, and local utility rules.

title: Solar Maintenance Expectations
summary: Set realistic expectations for monitoring, cleaning, warranties, and what to do when production looks unusual.

title: Choosing a Solar Installer
summary: Compare installers with practical questions about licensing, design assumptions, equipment, warranties, and communication.
